title: Empty Hands
body:
When you come in to the world it is empty and unknown
Who will you be
The questions begin to stack
But if we are questioned before we have a chance to think
How can you be you
Who determines you

You came in empty handed
Empty hearted
Blessed to feel no hatred for the first time
But cursed to feel love

How do I become who I want
When I do not know what I am

Am I a leaf
that flows down a stream with no worries
or maybe a rock
strong and rigid
only to be eroded
by the same river that carries the leaf

maybe I am the moss
growing quiet on the side of the rock
soft but still holding on
soaking in the same river
that carries the leaf

I will leave this world
the same way I came in
